reviews.review_description: This game is straight up fire. I love the concept!

So, let’s talk about this game.

     In my opinion, this game is FIRE! The music is fire, The gameplay is fire, the idea is fire, the everything is fire, and… yeah.

     Now, let’s get to the point on why this review was rated 2 stars instead of 5.

     Despite this game having 1,000,000 pros (Good things.) there are a few cons (Bad things.) with the pros.

     The cons are lag.

     This game is kinda laggy, for instance: When doing the infinite parkour, my hands would noclip through the blocks. Or, when walking around the map. I would suddenly noclip through the floor. Also, the frame rate is at from 50-30 FPS. Also, the moderation is VERY toxic. I’ve been told that by a mod that I should quit this game.

     But, other than that, this game is GREAT! Yet, I would not recommend it.

developer_response.body: Could you dm "px.sp" on Discord about the moderator, and I can see what is happening with that, and the FPS is fixed.

reviews.review_description: this game is really fun!!! i got to world two and so on and you should REALLY get this game. only problem is that infinite parkour doesn't work and you have to rejoin edit: it works you just have to go to it through the watch

I was playing on island 2 and heard some creaking and I teleported to the hub and it was still going on and I was in a public but there was no one there since the games dead ig. I left cuz I’m a wuss and got scared. The only reason I’m not giving a bad rating is cuz this game is underrated and needs this 5 star to grow. Just needs people to play more or start playing.

If you say this game is bad you will be executed this game is a upgrade game with a lot of stuff to do there is a shop 3 islands to upgrade a cube clicker and a lot more this game might be my new favorite game
THIS NEEDS MORE PLAYERS ITSGENUINELY SO GOOD
The game has a very cool concept and the movement feels better then most more popular games😁
The gameplay is nice and I like grinding the click cube but the environment, music, and graphics are just so calming, the world is pretty huge and theres water around the hub, peak. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
